This dictionary populates a push-stream node for sound events that PHASE generates for [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNodeDefinition] in your event node tree. # pushStreamNodes

**Instance Property**

A collection of audio streams for playback.

## Declaration

```swift
var pushStreamNodes: [String : PHASEPushStreamNode] { get }
```

## Discussion

This dictionary populates a push-stream node for sound events that PHASE generates for [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNodeDefinition] in your event node tree. The dictionary key is the stream-node definition’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEDefinition/identifier].
title: pushStreamNodes
